channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Jamie Dimon won't invest more of his own money in long-term bonds due to $39 trillion national debt
item.description: "These are very high debt numbers... Usually you need a great recession, depression, or war to see such figures," Dimon said.

item.title: Alliance for America's Skilled Trades: How skilled trades can build America's future
item.description: Ford, Carhartt, BlackRock, and Google formed the Alliance for America's Skilled Trades as 2.1 million jobs may go unfilled by 2030.

item.title: Current price of oil as of July 21, 2026
item.description: Changes in oil prices affect energy costs and the price of everyday items. Here's why.

item.title: Iran calls for full-scale war but a peace proposal may reopen the Strait of Hormuz if Trump accepts
item.description: Key morning briefing for business and market updates.
